description_long: This is an electric guitar with a contoured, double-cutaway body finished in a glossy black with blue and white accents, including a stylized American flag motif. The body features a white pickguard and three single-coil pickups, along with a standard control layout of knobs and a selector switch. The neck is made of light-colored wood, likely maple, and is bolted onto the body, with a rosewood or similar dark fingerboard and dot inlays. The headstock is classic in shape, with six inline tuning pegs and a natural wood finish, lacking any visible logo. The bridge is a standard tremolo type, and the overall design is reminiscent of the Fender Stratocaster style. This guitar is typically used for live performances, street music, or as a decorative piece in urban environments.
description: A glossy black and blue electric guitar with a white pickguard, three single-coil pickups, and a classic contoured body. It features a maple neck, six inline tuners, and an American flag motif.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the neck, headstock, and the body with the American flag motif clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the guitar's slim body thickness, the curvature of the back, and the protruding neck.
description_view_2: Rear angled view displaying the pickguard, pickups, and control knobs, as well as the body contours and bridge.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile showing the back of the guitar and the neck's attachment to the body.
attribute_headstock_design: Classic six-inline headstock, natural wood finish, no visible logo
